"You will feel like you're standing on the edge of a skyscraper ... you'll feel the web vibrating as you're https:

• 해당 형식을 위해 특별히 장면을 촬영했습니다.
• 미국에서는 IMAX로 개봉되지 않습니다.

bsky.text:
Dwindling reservoirs aren't the result of "bad weather" or "natural cycles". They're a choice our society made.

Growing thirsty crops like alfalfa and pecans in the desert is a choice. Refusing to reduce CO2 emissions is a choice. Refusing to change the water laws as reality cha

bsky.name: Jocelyn Anderson Photography
bsky.text: I was getting ready to mow the lawn when I noticed a Monarch butterfly sipping nectar from a Rose of Sharon bush. I ran back in to grab my camera and took a few a shots before the butterfly left to visit other flowers. Such a treat to see these beauties.
